NOTE 3 — REVENUE

The Company recognizes revenue when performance obligations are satisfied.
For fiscal year 2023, total net sales were $383,285 million.
Product revenue: $298,085 million. Service revenue: $85,200 million.

NOTE 4 — PROPERTY, PLANT AND EQUIPMENT

Depreciation is computed using the straight-line method.
Useful lives: Buildings 10-40 years, Machinery 3-10 years.
For fiscal year 2023, depreciation and amortization expense was $11,519 million.
For fiscal year 2022, depreciation and amortization expense was $11,104 million.

NOTE 5 — DEBT

The Company had outstanding fixed-rate notes totaling $106,572 million at September 2023.
Maturity schedule (in millions):
2024: $9,972
2025: $10,867
2026: $9,908
2027: $9,647
Thereafter: $66,178

NOTE 6 — INCOME TAXES

The effective tax rate for fiscal 2023 was 14.6%.
The effective tax rate for fiscal 2022 was 16.2%.
Net deferred tax assets were $17,852 million at September 2023.
